title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same capabilities as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embedding provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoints).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous & asynchronous APIs and model management.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli (go-llama)
summary: Community Go CLI that wraps Ollama endpoints for quick chatting and model ops in terminals.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s chat interface.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers users via any Ollama model; slash commands & thread support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU/node-selector options.

title: ollama-chatbot (streamlit)
summary: Streamlit chat app that talks to Ollama; shows conversation history and token metrics.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS module that injects an Ollama service for use in TypeScript backends.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client library for Ollama with GenServer-backed process management.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that exposes Ollama chat completions with user authentication.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama + llama-index for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on AWS EC2 with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server letting you call Ollama from any MCP client (e.g., Claude Desktop).

title: ollama-gui (Tauri)
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Rust (Tauri) and React.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via slash commands and app mentions.
